zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Burgh於1210年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可牛頓 聖 菲絲時，他的父親Hubert de Burgh 1st Earl of Kent42歲，母親Beatrix de Warenne, Lady of Wormegay35歲。他和Hawise de Lanvallei至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1274年12月1日之前在英國英格蘭貝德福爾阿斯普利 吉斯，埋葬在英國素可列維斯列維斯 聖 多馬 亞特 克利夫。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Burgh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from one or other of the ten English places named Burgh in northern England and East Anglia, or the six named Brough in Derbyshire, Nottinghamshire, Westmorland, and Yorkshire. All these are from Old English burg, burh, Middle English burgh ‘massive earthwork, fortification; manor, borough’. Compare Bury . The placename Burgh is pronounced as borough. The surname Brough arose equally from places now called Burgh and Brough, and is the more common form of the surname in modern Britain, where it is pronounced bruff or broof (/brʊf/). The Scottish surname was probably brought in from Yorkshire. For the surname in Ireland see Burke .

variants.name: Burke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Siobhan, Aileen, Brennan, Brigid, Donovan, Liam, Murphy, Ulick, Aidan, Dermot.

English and Irish (of Anglo-Norman origin): habitational name from Burgh (Castle) in Suffolk, England. Burk represents an Anglo-Norman pronunciation of Old English burg, Middle English burgh ‘fortification’ (see Burgh ).

variants.name: Bury
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Bury in Lancashire (now part of Greater Manchester), or from some other similarly named place. The placename comes from the dative case, byrig, of Old English burh ‘fortified place’.

Walloon and French: habitational name from any of several places so named, in Wallonia (Belgium) and Oise (France). The placename is from Buriacum, the name of a Gallo-Roman estate, composed of the personal name Burius + the locative suffix -acum. This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium.

variants.name: Brough
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of various English places called Brough or Burgh. See   Burgh  .
Scottish: habitational name from Brough in Harray (Orkney).
Americanized form of German   Brauch   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Burrow
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a castle or manor house, or in a town, especially a chartered town or borough (Middle English burgh, Old English burg ‘fortified place, borough, manor’), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named because it was a fortified town or near an ancient fort, such as Burrow (Leicestershire, Lancashire), Burrough Green (Cambridgeshire), Brough (numerous counties), and Peterborough (Northamptonshire); see also Burgh .

topographic name for someone who lived on a hill or near a mound (Middle English bergh, Old English beorg), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named, such as Burrow (Devon, Somerset). Middle English bergh became throughly confused with burgh in 1 above. Compare Burrough .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Burgh was born in 1210, in Newton Saint Faith, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hubert de Burgh 1st Earl of Kent, was 42 and his mother, Beatrix de Warenne, Lady of Wormegay, was 35. He had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Hawise de Lanvallei. He died before 1 December 1274, in Aspley Guise, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Lewes St Thomas at Cliffe, Lewes, Sussex, England.

Il est décédé avant 1 décembre 1274, à Aspley Guise, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Lewes St Thomas at Cliffe, Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Burgh 1210 in Newton Saint Faith, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hubert de Burgh 1st Earl of Kent 42 und seine Mutter Beatrix de Warenne, Lady of Wormegay 35. Er hatte mit Hawise de Lanvallei mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb vor 1. Dezember 1274 in Aspley Guise, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lewes St Thomas at Cliffe, Lewes, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Burgh è nato il nel 1210 nel Newton Saint Faith, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hubert de Burgh 1st Earl of Kent, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Beatrix de Warenne, Lady of Wormegay, aveva 35 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Hawise de Lanvallei. Morì prima del 1 dicembre 1274, nel Aspley Guise, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Lewes St Thomas at Cliffe, Lewes, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Burghが1210年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクニュートン サイント ファイスで生まれた時，父Hubert de Burgh 1st Earl of Kentは42歳，母Beatrix de Warenne, Lady of Wormegayは35歳であった。彼はHawise de Lanvalleiとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1274年12月1日以前にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアアスプリー グイゼで死去し，イギリススセックスルスルス スト ソマス アト クリフにて埋葬された。

ko.Burgh, Cawston & Newton, Norfolk, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 뉴턴 세인트 파이스
ko.St Thomas at Cliffe, Lewes, Sussex, Engl: 영국 수세스 루스 루스 스트 톰아스 앳 클리프
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Burgh(이)가 1210년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 뉴턴 세인트 파이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hubert de Burgh 1st Earl of Kent(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix de Warenne, Lady of Wormegay(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Hawise de Lanvallei(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1274년 12월 1일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 아스플리 길즈에서 사망했으며 영국 수세스 루스 루스 스트 톰아스 앳 클리프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Burgh nasceu em 1210, em Newton Saint Faith, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hubert de Burgh 1st Earl of Kent, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix de Warenne, Lady of Wormegay, tinha 35 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com Hawise de Lanvallei. Ele faleceu antes 1 de dezembro de 1274, em Aspley Guise, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Lewes St Thomas at Cliffe, Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Burgh родился в 1210 г. в местности нютон сеинт феит, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hubert de Burgh 1st Earl of Kent было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrix de Warenne, Lady of Wormegay, 35. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Hawise de Lanvallei. Он умер перед 1 декабрь 1274 г. в местности аспли гуис, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности львесь ст томас ат клифф, львесь, суссекс, Англия.

es.Aspley Guise, Bedfordshire, England: Aspley Guise, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Burgh, Cawston & Newton, Norfolk, Englan: Newton Saint Faith, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.St Thomas at Cliffe, Lewes, Sussex, Engl: Lewes St Thomas at Cliffe, Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Burgh nació en 1210, en Newton Saint Faith, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hubert de Burgh 1st Earl of Kent, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Beatrix de Warenne, Lady of Wormegay, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas con Hawise de Lanvallei. Murió antes de 1 de diciembre de 1274, en Aspley Guise, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Lewes St Thomas at Cliffe, Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.
